raw_text: When consumer income rises, the demand for a normal good increases because consumers have more purchasing power. This shifts the demand curve to the right. As a result, the equilibrium price rises and the equilibrium quantity also rises. I can illustrate this with a supply-demand diagram: the original demand curve D1 shifts right to D2, intersecting the upward-sloping supply curve at a higher price P2 and quantity Q2 compared to the original P1 and Q1.
cleaned_text: When consumer income rises, the demand for a normal good increases because consumers have more purchasing power. This shifts the demand curve to the right. As a result, the equilibrium price rises and the equilibrium quantity also rises. I can illustrate this with a supply-demand diagram: the original demand curve D1 shifts right to D2, intersecting the upward-sloping supply curve at a higher price P2 and quantity Q2 compared to the original P1 and Q1.

raw_text: Higher income means people buy more of a normal good. The demand curve shifts right and prices go up. The quantity sold also increases. A diagram would show the new equilibrium at a higher price and quantity.
cleaned_text: Higher income means people buy more of a normal good. The demand curve shifts right and prices go up. The quantity sold also increases. A diagram would show the new equilibrium at a higher price and quantity.

raw_text: If income increases, demand increases. This means the price goes up. I think the supply also increases because producers want to earn more. The diagram shows both curves moving.
cleaned_text: If income increases, demand increases. This means the price goes up. I think the supply also increases because producers want to earn more. The diagram shows both curves moving.
extraction_notes: Possible confusion between demand shift and supply response; low word count

raw_text: The French Revolution began in 1789 when the Third Estate demanded representation. Marie Antoinette famously said let them eat cake. The Bastille was stormed on 14 July. Napoleon later rose to power following the chaos of the Directory.
cleaned_text: The French Revolution began in 1789 when the Third Estate demanded representation. Marie Antoinette famously said let them eat cake. The Bastille was stormed on 14 July. Napoleon later rose to power following the chaos of the Directory.
